issue_summary: fix compile/javadocs, tighten up backwards codecs, add more safety to 5.x fields/vectors
javadoc_before:
/** Optimized implementation of a vector of bits. This is more-or-less like * java.util.BitSet, but also includes the following: *
    *
  • a count() method, which efficiently computes the number of one bits;
    • *
  • optimized read from and write to disk;
    • *
  • inlinable get() method;
    • *
  • store and load, as bit set or d-gaps, depending on sparseness;
    • *
* * @lucene.internal */
javadoc_after:
/** 
 * Bitset for support of 4.x live documents
 * @deprecated only for old 4.x segments
 */
